blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,962 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
